title: Fix dashboard startup failure: missing @tailwindcss/postcss and Jersey 20 font override

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Installed dashboard dependencies to restore missing @tailwindcss/postcss and patched Jersey_20 font config in app/layout.tsx with adjustFontFallback:false to avoid font override failure. Running build verification.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resolved dashboard startup/build blockers. Changes: set Jersey_20 adjustFontFallback:false in app/layout.tsx; pinned Tailwind toolchain to 4.0.0-compatible set on Node 18 (@tailwindcss/postcss/tailwindcss + oxide-linux-x64-gnu, with @tailwindcss/node and @tailwindcss/oxide overrides); pinned nanoid to ^3.3.8 to avoid PostCSS CJS/ESM break. Verification: node can require @tailwindcss/postcss and npm run build:fast now succeeds.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Preparing commit to develop with dashboard startup/build fix (Tailwind/PostCSS/oxide compatibility + Jersey_20 fallback guard), then pushing to trigger CI.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed fixed. Dashboard startup issue with missing @tailwindcss/postcss and Jersey 20 font override was resolved.
